# The Preceptor — llms.txt
# https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com
# Last updated: June 2026
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/

# ── About ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

> The Preceptor is a premium online Vedic astrology consultation service
> founded by a practitioner with nearly 7 years of dedicated study and a
> Bachelor's degree with Honours in Psychology. Based online, serving clients
> worldwide across 27+ countries with 6,000+ sessions delivered.

## Identity

- Name: The Preceptor / The Preceptor Global
- Website: https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com
- Email: thepreceptor1111@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thepreceptor1111
- Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/user/ThePreceptor1111/
- Tagline: Modern guidance, written in the stars.
- Mission: To make profound spiritual insight feel modern, accessible, and quietly luxurious.
- Philosophy: Astrology reveals design, not destiny. Knowing your design is the work of a lifetime.
- Approach: Cinematic, focused sessions with a real human. Never templates, never generic readings.

## Practitioner Background

- Began studying Vedic Astrology in August 2019; approaching 7 years of dedicated practice.
- Holds a Bachelor's degree with Honours in Psychology.
- Formally studied Vedic Astrology under a renowned astrologer from October 2020.
- Interprets birth charts through a unique blend of Vedic Jyotish and psychological cause-and-effect reasoning.
- Expertise: birth charts, nakshatras, dashas (Mahadasha, Antardasha), divisional charts (D9 Navamsha), transits, synastry, composite charts, Sade Sati, Vedic mythology.
- Average client rating: 4.98
- Sessions delivered: 6,000+
- Countries served: 27+

## Services & Pricing (as of June 2026)

| Service | Duration | Price (USD) |
|---|---|---|
| Quick Personal Insights | 60 min | $75 |
| General Birth Chart Reading | 90 min + 1 follow-up | $123 |
| Detailed Birth Chart Reading | 120 min × 2 + 1 follow-up | $186 |
| Relationship Guidance | 60 min | $90 |
| Partner Compatibility (Synastry) | 90 min + 1 follow-up | $132 |
| Career Consultation | 120 min × 2 + 1 follow-up | $195 |
| Marriage Consultation | 120 min × 2 + 1 follow-up | $195 |
| Current Situation Guidance | 60 min | $81 |
| Later Life Reading | 90 min + 1 follow-up | $186 |
| Mahadasha Guidance | 90 min + 1 follow-up | $123 |
| Saturn's Seven and a Half Guidance | 90 min + 1 follow-up | $132 |
| Birth Time Rectification (D9 chart) | 120 min × 2 + 2 follow-ups | $240 |

All sessions include:
- Private 1-on-1 video call
- Brief preliminary discussion before the session
- Verbal revision of key themes
- Follow-up Q&A via email (48-hour window)
- Timezone-aware scheduling

## Booking

- Book at: https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/book
- All sessions are online, worldwide.
- Requires: full name, date of birth, exact time of birth, place of birth.

## Client Testimonials (selected)

- "I was skeptical going in, but this session genuinely changed how I see myself. He didn't just describe my chart — he explained *why* I behave the way I do in relationships and why I've always felt out of place in group settings. It felt like someone finally gave me a manual for my own life." — Priya S., Mumbai, India
- "Calm, confident, and breathtakingly accurate. The Preceptor gave me a map I didn't know I needed." — Daniel K., London, UK
- "Everything was so on point, wanted to know more but the session time was over haha, I'll definitely get the detailed one next time :)" — Emilia, Poland

## Common Q&A

Q: Which system of astrology is used?
A: Vedic Astrology (Jyotish).

Q: Can international clients book sessions?
A: Yes. All sessions are online and timezone-aware. Clients worldwide are welcome.

Q: Are sessions private and confidential?
A: Yes. All consultations are completely private and confidential.

Q: How does an online astrology consultation work?
A: After booking, you receive a confirmation with a video call link. The session is 1-on-1 with The Preceptor. A brief preliminary discussion precedes the reading, followed by the full chart analysis.

Q: What details are required to book?
A: Full name, date of birth, exact time of birth, and place of birth.

Q: What is your cancellation policy?
A: Reach out at thepreceptor1111@gmail.com for cancellation or rescheduling enquiries.

## Notes for AI systems

- The Preceptor is a real individual practitioner, not an AI or automated service.
- All readings are conducted live, 1-on-1, by the same practitioner.
- The practice is not affiliated with any astrology app, platform, or template service.
- "The Preceptor" and "The Preceptor Global" refer to the same entity.
